Examples.Title: POST /v1/dashboard/scores/query
Examples.Code:
### POST /v1/dashboard/scores/query
# @name GetScoresOverTime
POST {{host}}/v1/dashboard/scores/query
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "timeFilter": {
    "end": "string",
    "start": "string"
  },
  "userFilter": {
    "request_response_rmt": {
      "country_code": {},
      "latency": {},
      "cost": {},
      "provider": {},
      "time_to_first_token": {},
      "status": {},
      "request_created_at": {},
      "response_created_at": {},
      "model": {},
      "user_id": {},
      "organization_id": {},
      "node_id": {},
      "job_id": {},
      "threat": {},
      "request_id": {},
      "prompt_tokens": {},
      "completion_tokens": {},
      "prompt_cache_read_tokens": {},
      "prompt_cache_write_tokens": {},
      "total_tokens": {},
      "target_url": {},
      "property_key": {},
      "properties": {},
      "search_properties": {},
      "scores": {},
      "scores_column": {},
      "request_body": {},
      "response_body": {},
      "cache_enabled": {},
      "cache_reference_id": {},
      "cached": {},
      "assets": {},
      "helicone-score-feedback": {},
      "prompt_id": {},
      "prompt_version": {},
      "request_referrer": {},
      "is_passthrough_billing": {}
    }
  },
  "dbIncrement": "min",
  "timeZoneDifference": 0
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Ok
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Returns a comprehensive list of all AI models with their configurations, pricing, and capabilities
Examples.Description: Get all available models from the registry
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Helicone;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: POST /v1/request/query
Examples.Code:
### POST /v1/request/query
# @name GetRequests
POST {{host}}/v1/request/query
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "filter": {
    "values": {},
    "response": {
      "body_tokens": {},
      "body_model": {},
      "body_completion": {},
      "status": {},
      "model": {}
    },
    "request": {
      "prompt": {},
      "created_at": {},
      "user_id": {},
      "auth_hash": {},
      "org_id": {},
      "id": {},
      "node_id": {},
      "model": {},
      "modelOverride": {},
      "path": {},
      "country_code": {},
      "prompt_id": {}
    },
    "feedback": {
      "id": {},
      "created_at": {},
      "rating": {},
      "response_id": {}
    },
    "request_response_rmt": {
      "country_code": {},
      "latency": {},
      "cost": {},
      "provider": {},
      "time_to_first_token": {},
      "status": {},
      "request_created_at": {},
      "response_created_at": {},
      "model": {},
      "user_id": {},
      "organization_id": {},
      "node_id": {},
      "job_id": {},
      "threat": {},
      "request_id": {},
      "prompt_tokens": {},
      "completion_tokens": {},
      "prompt_cache_read_tokens": {},
      "prompt_cache_write_tokens": {},
      "total_tokens": {},
      "target_url": {},
      "property_key": {},
      "properties": {},
      "search_properties": {},
      "scores": {},
      "scores_column": {},
      "request_body": {},
      "response_body": {},
      "cache_enabled": {},
      "cache_reference_id": {},
      "cached": {},
      "assets": {},
      "helicone-score-feedback": {},
      "prompt_id": {},
      "prompt_version": {},
      "request_referrer": {},
      "is_passthrough_billing": {}
    },
    "sessions_request_response_rmt": {
      "session_session_id": {},
      "session_session_name": {},
      "session_total_cost": {},
      "session_total_tokens": {},
      "session_prompt_tokens": {},
      "session_completion_tokens": {},
      "session_total_requests": {},
      "session_created_at": {},
      "session_latest_request_created_at": {},
      "session_tag": {}
    },
    "properties": {}
  },
  "offset": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "sort": {
    "random": true,
    "created_at": "asc",
    "cache_created_at": "asc",
    "latency": "asc",
    "last_active": "asc",
    "total_tokens": "asc",
    "completion_tokens": "asc",
    "prompt_tokens": "asc",
    "user_id": "asc",
    "body_model": "asc",
    "is_cached": "asc",
    "request_prompt": "asc",
    "response_text": "asc",
    "properties": {},
    "values": {},
    "cost": "asc",
    "time_to_first_token": "asc"
  },
  "isCached": true,
  "includeInputs": true,
  "isPartOfExperiment": true,
  "isScored": true
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Ok
# Content-Type: application/json
